2605.17991.title: Stable Audio 3
2605.17991.paper_summary: Stable Audio 3 is a family of fast latent diffusion models (small, medium, large) for variable-length audio generation and editing. Since our models can generate several minutes of audio, variable-length generations are key to avoid the cost of producing full-length generations for short sounds. We also support inpainting, enabling targeted audio editing and the continuation of short recordings. Our latent diffusion models operate on top of a novel semantic-acoustic autoencoder that projects audio into a compact latent space, enabling efficient diffusion-based generation while preserving audio fidelity and encouraging semantic structure in the latent. Finally, we run adversarial post-training to both accelerate inference and improve generation quality, reducing the number of inference steps while improving fidelity and prompt adherence. Stable Audio 3 models are trained on licensed and Creative Commons data to generate music and sounds in less than a 2s on an H200 GPU and less than a few seconds on a MacBook Pro M4. We release the weights of small and medium, that can run on consumer-grade hardware, together with their training and inference pipeline.
2605.17991.paper_summary_zh: 穩定音頻 3 是一系列快速潛在擴散模型（小型、中型、大型），用於可變長度的音頻生成和編輯。由於我們的模型可以生成幾分鐘的音頻，因此可變長度的生成對於避免為短音效產生完整長度生成的成本至關重要。我們還支持修補，實現有針對性的音頻編輯和短錄音的延續。我們的潛在擴散模型基於一種新型的語義-聲學自編碼器，將音頻投影到緊湊的潛在空間中，實現高效的基於擴散的生成，同時保持音頻的保真度並促進潛在空間中的語義結構。最後，我們進行對抗性後訓練，以加速推理並提高生成質量，減少推理步驟的數量，同時改善保真度和提示遵循性。穩定音頻 3 模型在授權和創用CC數據上進行訓練，可在 H200 GPU 上生成音樂和聲音，時間少於 2 秒，在 MacBook Pro M4 上則少於幾秒。我們發布了小型和中型模型的權重，這些模型可以在消費級硬體上運行，並提供其訓練和推理管道。
2605.17991.author: Zach Evans et.al.
2605.17991.authors: Zach Evans, Julian D. Parker, Matthew Rice, CJ Carr, Zack Zukowski, Josiah Taylor, Jordi Pons
